examples: The radio that came with the Evader worked just fine.
I had to look for new wheels and tires for the Evader.
Even with the bigger tires, I could have kept the original buggy body on the Evader.
He was a flagrant tax-evader: when the authorities finally caught up with him, he had to sell his estate to pay them.
Ben encouraged Timmy the Evader to borrow too much food, knowing that there was no way Fairyland at Foggy Bottom could ever pay it back.
